message:
test(db): add WBQ error path tests, pool/query hardening, and schema migration coverage

Coalesce (br-3h13.3.1):
- WBQ overflow tests: verify eviction under max_entries=1 still completes,
  concurrent overflow with 10 threads on distinct keys, timeout eviction
  cleanup correctness
- Determinism tests: same-key sequential calls, leader closure panic
  propagation, map reusability after panic
- Join semantics: was_joined flag correctness for leaders vs followers,
  error propagation to all joiners
- Stats tracking: inflight count, leader/joiner/timeout counters
- Large payload tests (1MB+ values), empty-key handling, rapid
  create-complete cycling, concurrent mixed success/failure

Pool (pool.rs):
- Refactored pool acquisition and health monitoring logic

Queries (queries.rs):
- Hardened SQL query generation and parameter binding

Schema (schema.rs):
- Schema versioning and migration step improvements

Schema migration tests:
- Updated test fixtures for new schema version compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
